channel.title: Bloomberg on Jared Szajkowski
channel.description: Recent content in Bloomberg on Jared Szajkowski

item.title: Reusable And Extensible Python Functions For Financial Data Analysis
item.description: A list of common functions used for data acquisition, cleaning, analysis, etc.

item.title: Does Harry Browne's permanent portfolio withstand the test of time?
item.description: A look a Harry Browne’s Permanent Portfolio and performance over nearly four decades.

item.title: Cleaning A Bloomberg Data Excel Export
item.description: A python function to clean and format an excel data export from Bloomberg.
